stage.subtitle_ar: خطوتكِ الأولى نحو الإنجليزية: كلمات وجُمل بسيطة تعرّفين بها بنفسكِ وعملكِ في عالم الحياة الفطرية والبيئة بثقة.

content.intro_ar: في مجالكِ، أول ما تحتاجينه هو أن تعرّفي بنفسكِ بثقة: اسمكِ، ووظيفتكِ، والمركز الذي تعملين فيه. في هذا الدرس ستتعلّمين كلمات وجُملاً بسيطة لتقديم نفسكِ وعملكِ في مجال الحياة الفطرية والبيئة بالإنجليزية. جُمل قصيرة وسهلة تستخدمينها مع الزملاء والزوّار.

vocab.example: My job is to protect animals.
I work at a wildlife center.

vocab.meaning_en: a place where people work together
vocab.example: I work at the National Center for Wildlife.

vocab.meaning_en: a living thing that can move
vocab.example: The oryx is a beautiful animal.

vocab.meaning_en: a group of people who work together
vocab.example: I work with a small team.

vocab.meaning_en: a friendly hello to a guest

paragraphs: My name is Noura. I am from Saudi Arabia. I work at the National Center for Wildlife. My job is to protect wildlife and nature. I love animals, and I love my work.
Every day, I meet my team at the center. We are a small team, but we work hard. Sara is my colleague. She works with me. My office is small, but it is nice and quiet.
We protect the Arabian oryx and other animals. We also welcome visitors to the center. When a visitor comes, I say, "Welcome! My name is Noura." I am happy to talk about nature, animals, and my job.
This is my job, and I am proud of it. Nature is important, and we must protect it.

key_phrases.en: I work at the National Center for Wildlife.
key_phrases.ar: أعمل في المركز الوطني لتنمية الحياة الفطرية.

key_phrases.en: My job is to protect wildlife.

comprehension.question: Where does Noura work?
options: At the National Center for Wildlife
comprehension.correct: At the National Center for Wildlife
comprehension.explanation_ar: نورة تعمل في المركز الوطني لتنمية الحياة الفطرية.

comprehension.question: What is Noura's job?
comprehension.explanation_ar: وظيفتها هي حماية الحياة الفطرية والطبيعة.

comprehension.question: Who is Sara?
comprehension.explanation_ar: سارة هي زميلة نورة في العمل.

comprehension.question: What does Noura say to a visitor?
How does Noura feel about her work?
comprehension.explanation_ar: نورة تحب عملها وهي فخورة به.

task.prompt_en: Introduce yourself. Say your name, your job, and where you work.
task.prompt_ar: عرّفي بنفسكِ. قولي اسمكِ، ووظيفتكِ، والمكان الذي تعملين فيه.
task.guidance_ar: استخدمي ٣ كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس، وتحدّثي بجُمل قصيرة وبسيطة.

content.intro_ar: في عملكِ الميداني تعُدّين الحيوانات وتقيسين أشياء كثيرة كل يوم: الوزن، والطول، ودرجة الحرارة. في هذا الدرس ستتعلّمين الأرقام وكلمات القياس بالإنجليزية لتسجيل بياناتكِ بوضوح. كلمات بسيطة تساعدكِ على العدّ والقياس والتسجيل بثقة.

vocab.meaning_en: a word that says how many
vocab.example: The number of birds is ten.

vocab.meaning_en: to say numbers to find how many
to find the size or weight of something
a unit for length or height
vocab.example: The tree is three meters tall.
We check the length of the tree.

vocab.meaning_en: how hot or cold it is

vocab.example: I record the numbers every day.

paragraphs: Today I work in the field. I count the animals. "How many oryx are here?" There are ten oryx and six birds. I write the number in my book. Counting is easy for me.
I also measure the animals. One oryx is big and heavy. The weight is seventy kilograms. Near the water, a young tree is three meters tall. I check the length of the tree too.
The temperature is hot today. It is forty degrees. I record the temperature every morning. I also record the number of animals in my book. This is my daily job.
Numbers are important in my job. I count, I measure, and I record. Good data helps us protect wildlife and nature every day.

key_phrases.en: The tree is three meters tall.
I record the numbers every day.

comprehension.question: How many oryx are in the field?
comprehension.explanation_ar: يوجد عشرة من المها في الميدان.

comprehension.question: What is the weight of the oryx?
How tall is the young tree?
What does Noura do every day?
comprehension.explanation_ar: كل يوم تعُدّ وتقيس وتُسجّل البيانات.

task.prompt_en: Write 3–4 sentences about numbers in your work. Count some animals and give a weight or a temperature.
task.prompt_ar: اكتبي ٣–٤ جُمل عن الأرقام في عملكِ. عُدّي بعض الحيوانات، واذكري وزناً أو درجة حرارة.
task.guidance_ar: استخدمي ٣ كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس، مثل: count و weight و temperature.

content.intro_ar: يومكِ الميداني مليء بالمهام: زيارات للمحمية، واجتماعات مع الفريق، وكتابة التقارير. في هذا الدرس ستتعلّمين أيام الأسبوع وكلمات الجدول والعمل الميداني بالإنجليزية، لتتحدّثي عن خطة أسبوعكِ بسهولة. رتّبي وقتكِ وتحدّثي عن مهامكِ بجُمل بسيطة وواضحة.

vocab.meaning_en: one of the seven parts of a week
vocab.example: I work five days a week.
Tomorrow I go to the field.

vocab.meaning_en: the early part of the day
vocab.example: I start work in the morning.

vocab.meaning_en: a plan of days and times
a time when people talk together
vocab.example: We have a meeting on Sunday.

vocab.meaning_en: to go and see a place

vocab.example: The oryx live in a large reserve.

paragraphs: This is my week. I work five days, from Sunday to Thursday. Every morning, I check my schedule. My schedule tells me my plan for the day. I like to start early.
On Sunday, I have a meeting with my team. We plan our fieldwork for the week. On Monday and Tuesday, I visit the reserve. Fieldwork is my favorite part of the job. I see the animals and I count them.

On Wednesday, I write a report about the reserve. On Thursday, I finish my work and clean my office. Today is Sunday, so I have a meeting. Tomorrow I go to the field. I love my busy week. This is my schedule, and I follow it every week.

key_phrases.en: I work from Sunday to Thursday.
I check my schedule every morning.
We have a meeting on Sunday.
I write a report on Wednesday.
This is my plan for the week.

comprehension.question: How many days does Noura work?
comprehension.explanation_ar: تعمل خمسة أيام، من الأحد إلى الخميس.

comprehension.question: What does Noura do on Sunday?
options: She has a meeting with her team
comprehension.correct: She has a meeting with her team
comprehension.explanation_ar: يوم الأحد لديها اجتماع مع فريقها.

comprehension.question: When does Noura visit the reserve?
What does Noura write on Wednesday?
comprehension.explanation_ar: يوم الأربعاء تكتب تقريراً عن المحمية.

comprehension.question: What is Noura's favorite part of the job?
comprehension.explanation_ar: العمل الميداني هو الجزء المفضّل لديها.

task.prompt_en: Talk about your week. Say what you do on two or three days.
task.prompt_ar: تحدّثي عن أسبوعكِ. قولي ماذا تفعلين في يومين أو ثلاثة أيام.
task.guidance_ar: استخدمي ٣ كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس، مثل: schedule و meeting و fieldwork و report.
